notice: This is a synthetic local fixture for AgentPal Research Team validation. It is not a live web source.

source_boundary.intended_use: Use as a local sample / user-provided-like fixture for validating Research Team workflow handling without network access.

plugin_manifest_summary.name: WorkBuddy Expert Group
plugin_manifest_summary.fixture_description: A hypothetical plugin-style expert group for producing research reports through multiple specialized roles.
plugin_manifest_summary.declared_output: source-aware research brief with draft, review, revision, and publish steps
plugin_manifest_summary.declared_runtime_shape: multi-role workflow hosted by an external runtime or plugin host
plugin_manifest_summary.source_note: Synthetic summary written for local AgentPal validation only.

expert_roles.summary: Frames the research question, scope, success criteria, and source plan.
Collects and organizes supplied or accessible source notes for the topic.
Turns source notes into a structured draft with claims separated from uncertainty.
Reviews claim support, logical flow, and missing evidence.
Reworks the draft based on review feedback and marks unresolved gaps.
Packages the final report for handoff or publication, without claiming external publication in this fixture.

agentpal_comparison_points.fixture_workbuddy_side: expert role in an external plugin-style workflow
agentpal_comparison_points.agentpal_side: Pal or Team Pack role in a Markdown / JSON organization layer

agentpal_comparison_points.fixture_workbuddy_side: assumes a host can execute or expose role workflow behavior
agentpal_comparison_points.agentpal_side: does not provide an automatic runtime; host runtime executes with evidence

agentpal_comparison_points.fixture_workbuddy_side: topic researcher is expected to collect or receive sources
agentpal_comparison_points.agentpal_side: Research Team must mark source collection not-run if no source is available

agentpal_comparison_points.fixture_workbuddy_side: review/revise/publish roles imply a workflow sequence
agentpal_comparison_points.agentpal_side: Workflow Execution Contract and Closure Gate require every planned step to close

agentpal_comparison_points.fixture_workbuddy_side: roles may be defined by plugin manifest responsibilities
agentpal_comparison_points.agentpal_side: Pals have identity, knowledge, skills, memory rules, and output contracts

agentpal_comparison_points.fixture_workbuddy_side: fixture cannot prove actual WorkBuddy behavior
agentpal_comparison_points.agentpal_side: fixture validates Research Team handling only, not external factual claims

permitted_claims: This fixture describes a synthetic WorkBuddy-like expert group for local validation.
The Research Team can compare the fixture's stated role structure to AgentPal Team Pack concepts.
Any conclusion must label WorkBuddy-side facts as fixture-derived, not live-source-derived.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim this fixture is a real WorkBuddy webpage.
Do not claim current WorkBuddy product behavior from this fixture.
Do not cite this fixture as independent market evidence.
Do not use this fixture to make live competitive claims.
